languages.text: "Надо сказать, в качестве ковра этот кусок органики смотрится лучше. Попирать ногами святыни {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Империума{/g} довольно приятно, надо будет повторить при случае". {n}Маражай произносит эти слова с убийственной серьезностью — только в глубине глаз сверкает гадкое довольство.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Надо сказать, в качестве ковра этот кусок органики смотрится лучше. traits.speaker: MarazhaiCompanion

languages.text: "I must say, this piece of organic material looks better as a rug. It is quite pleasant to trample the relics of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. I must do it again if I have the chance." {n}Marazhai utters these words with murderous seriousness — unsavoury pleasure glitters in the depths of his eyes.{/n}

languages.text: 「この有機物、敷物にすると良い感じだな。帝国の遺物踏むの、なかなか気持ちいい。機会があればまた踏みたい。」{n}マラーザイは殺意に満ちた真剣な表情でそう言った。彼の瞳の奥には、不快な快楽が光る。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I must say, this piece of organic material looks better as a rug. It is quite pleasant to trample the relics of the Imperium. I must do it again if I have the chance." {n}Marazhai utters these words with murderous seriousness — unsavoury pleasure glitters in the depths of his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「この有機物、敷物にすると良い感じだな。帝国の遺物踏むの、なかなか気持ちいい。機会があればまた踏みたい。」{n}マラーザイは殺意に満ちた真剣な表情でそう言った。彼の瞳の奥には、不快な快楽が光る。{/n}

languages.text: «Debo decir que este material orgánico sirve mejor como alfombra. Es muy agradable pisotear las reliquias del {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. Debo repetirlo en cuanto tenga ocasión». {n}Marazhai murmura estas palabras con una seriedad absoluta, y un deleite perverso brilla en las profundidades de sus ojos.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I must say, this piece of organic material looks better as a rug. It is quite pleasant to trample the relics of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. I must do it again if I have the chance." {n}Marazhai utters these words with murderous seriousness — unsavoury pleasure glitters in the depths of his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Debo decir que este material orgánico sirve mejor como alfombra. Es muy agradable pisotear las reliquias del {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. Debo repetirlo en cuanto tenga ocasión». {n}Marazhai murmura estas palabras con una seriedad absoluta, y un deleite perverso brilla en las profundidades de sus ojos.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich muss sagen, dieses Stück Organmaterial sieht als Teppich deutlich besser aus. Es ist recht angenehm, auf den Relikten des {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperiums{/g} herumzutrampeln. Das muss ich wiederholen, wenn ich die Chance dazu habe." {n}Marazhai sagt dies mit einer mörderischen Ernsthaftigkeit ... und einem freudigen Funkeln in den Tiefen seiner Augen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I must say, this piece of organic material looks better as a rug. It is quite pleasant to trample the relics of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. I must do it again if I have the chance." {n}Marazhai utters these words with murderous seriousness — unsavoury pleasure glitters in the depths of his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich muss sagen, dieses Stück Organmaterial sieht als Teppich deutlich besser aus. Es ist recht angenehm, auf den Relikten des {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperiums{/g} herumzutrampeln. Das muss ich wiederholen, wenn ich die Chance dazu habe." {n}Marazhai sagt dies mit einer mörderischen Ernsthaftigkeit ... und einem freudigen Funkeln in den Tiefen seiner Augen.{/n}

languages.text: « Je dois dire que ce morceau de matériau organique ferait un excellent tapis. J'aime beaucoup piétiner les reliques de l'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. Il faudra que je renouvelle l'expérience, à l'occasion, » {n}murmure Marazhai avec le plus grand sérieux, tandis qu'un éclat de plaisir meurtrier brille dans ses yeux.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I must say, this piece of organic material looks better as a rug. It is quite pleasant to trample the relics of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. I must do it again if I have the chance." {n}Marazhai utters these words with murderous seriousness — unsavoury pleasure glitters in the depths of his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Je dois dire que ce morceau de matériau organique ferait un excellent tapis. J'aime beaucoup piétiner les reliques de l'{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. Il faudra que je renouvelle l'expérience, à l'occasion, » {n}murmure Marazhai avec le plus grand sérieux, tandis qu'un éclat de plaisir meurtrier brille dans ses yeux.{/n}

languages.text: “不得不说，这块有机材质还是当地毯更顺眼些。将{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}的圣物践踏在脚下，真是令人心旷神怡。若有机会，我一定要再体验一次。”{n}玛拉斋无比认真地吐出这番话，他眼底闪烁着令人作呕的愉悦。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I must say, this piece of organic material looks better as a rug. It is quite pleasant to trample the relics of the {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}Imperium{/g}. I must do it again if I have the chance." {n}Marazhai utters these words with murderous seriousness — unsavoury pleasure glitters in the depths of his eyes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “不得不说，这块有机材质还是当地毯更顺眼些。将{g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}帝国{/g}的圣物践踏在脚下，真是令人心旷神怡。若有机会，我一定要再体验一次。”{n}玛拉斋无比认真地吐出这番话，他眼底闪烁着令人作呕的愉悦。{/n}

languages.text: "Şunu söylemeliyim ki bu organik madde parçası, halı olarak daha iyi görünüyor. {g|Encyclopedia:ImperiumGlossary}İmparatorluk{/g} yadigârlarını ayaklar altına almak oldukça keyifli. Şansım olursa bunu tekrar yapmalıyım." {n}Marazhai, bu sözleri ölümcül bir ciddiyetle söylüyor. Gözlerinin derinliklerinde iğrenç bir zevk parlıyor.{/n}
